name: SWORDS
subtitle: Dual Analog Multi-Mode Filter
summary: Two 12 dB state-variable filters built around the V2164 chip — the same design Émilie Gillet used in Blades. Continuously morphing low/band/high response, drive that runs from soft clipping to two-stage wavefolding, CV-controllable routing from single to parallel to series, and a SHIFT button that locks the two cutoffs together.
